raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Laufajt tcho Wahrdu /
juhs taakas Gohwis /
tas us to Kalnu no Sa-
martjas irr / kas tohs Nabba-
gus nospatda / tohs Waijadsī-
gus fatreez / kas uhs winnu
Rungeem fatka : Neffeet tchurp /
a uchs dseram.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas Klungs KUNGS irr
fwehrejs pee tawas Svehtibas /
cedsi / kad tahs Deenas pahr
iums nahks / ka juhs tapfeet us-
vilkti ar Rabhtscheem / un juhsu
Pehznahkamee ar Sinju
Makschkereem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un juhs iseefeet zaur teem
Plaifumeem tkweena tawá
Breeksehá / un tapfeet prett Ar-
monu nomestas / fatka tas
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nahzeet us Beteli / nn
oahrkahpect us Gilgalu / un wat-
ojeet to Pahrkahpfchaun / un
ceffeet juhsus Uppuzus Ribtā /
uhtus Definitus pahr trim Dee-
ahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kwehpinaijt no Ranga
ar Patriſchinas Uppureem /
n isfanzeet ar labba Prahta
ippurus / laischat to dsterdeht /
o ta tas jums patihk / juhs J-
caēta Behrni/ fatka tas Klungs
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz etim es juins ar-
dsan Watta Sohbus dewis,
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "wiﬀds juhsu Pilssfahtōs / un
Maisēs Truhkumu wiﬀāsjuhsu
Weetās / tomehr juhs pee man-
nint ne eﬀat atgreeſufchees / fat-
ka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl efmu es jums tahs
Leetus aiſturejs / kad wehl trihs
Mehneschi bija lihdsptaujamam
Laikam / un efmu lizzis pahr
weenu Pilssfahtu liht / bet pahr
ohtru ne liht / weens Semmes
Gabbats tappe aplihts / bet zits
Gabbats / pahr ko Leetus ne lih-
ja / fatkalte.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un divi trihs Pilssfahti
zehlahs uhs weenu Pilssfahtu /
ka tee Uhdeni dsertu / bet ne dab-
buja / ka teem peetiktu / tat-
schu juhs ne eﬀat pee mannim
atgreeſufchees / fatka tas Klungs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es efmu juhs tittis ar
Bullu un ar Ruhfu / ir tahs
Rahpes ehde wiſju / kas juhsōs
Dahrsōs / un juhsōs Widna-
Dahrsōs / un us juhsuem Wihg-
ges-Rohkeem / un Etjes-Rohkeem
aug / tatschu juhs pee mannim
ne eﬀat atgreeſufchees / fatka tas
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es efmu to Mehri starp
juhsu fuhtijis / itt ka Egiptes-
Seimmē / es nokawu juhsus
Jaunekus zaur Sohbinu / un
lieku juhsus Sirgus aiswest / un
cs lieku to Smartchnu juhsu
Kaxxa-Spehku juhsās Nahfis
nskahpt : Tatschu juhs pee man-
nim ne eﬀat atgreeſufchees / fat-
ka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es efmu zittns starp jums
apgahe
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
